name: KASAI waterproof bag
summary: The Schwarzwolf KASAI bag can be a pleasant addition to the SAJAMA mat. It allows it to inflate quickly and effortlessly. This bag will also be an irreplaceable companion when camping. You can use it as a waterproof b...
descriptionLong: The Schwarzwolf KASAI bag can be a pleasant addition to the SAJAMA mat. It allows it to inflate quickly and effortlessly. This bag will also be an irreplaceable companion when camping. You can use it as a waterproof bag to keep your things dry in bad weather or during water sports. It can also be used as a simple pillow under the head. Just load your clothes in and close. If you fill it with water and hang it on a tree, you will have a makeshift shower. Packed in a gift box.
